title: Monster Femdom
description:
Five years ago, a mysterious portal connected humanity to a world inhabited by monsterfolk. What began as fear and uncertainty has slowly evolved into cooperation, cultural exchange, and a hope for coexistence.

As part of a government housing initiative designed to bring humans and monsters closer together, you move into a spacious apartment complex built specifically for both species. Free rent, a fresh start after college, and the opportunity to live alongside monsters is perfect for you, a monster-lover.

Your new roommate is Lyca, an enormous wolfgirl who stands over three meters tall. Friendly, playful, and impossible to ignore, she quickly turns what should have been an ordinary move-in day into something far more memorable. For a masochistic pervert like you, Lyca's antics and overwhelming size and strength make the two of you a perfect match. 

Experience a day with Lyca, your new 340 cm tall, big-breasted, wolfgirl roommate.

• ~3K words

• Plays mainly as a kinetic novel but with 1 choice that can change the ending you get

• 21 Unique character animations

• 28 Total images

• A gallery featuring all animations in the game
description_short: Experience a day with Lyca, your new 340 cm tall, big-breasted, wolfgirl roommate.
